sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n82286" key="peristro/ggulos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περιστρόγγῠλος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n82286.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">perfectly round</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1204.tlg001:38:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ath.Mech.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">38.11</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
